description: Empty repositories should receive the full advanced harness scaffold.
Frontend repositories should trigger frontend-specific confirmations, including desired style direction, and expose existing style-code signals.
Init should reconcile an existing harness by refreshing managed files and adding newly introduced managed files.
Clean should dry-run by default, remove local harness runtime state, update .gitignore, and stage removal of tracked harness runtime artifacts when applied.
Execution plans should refuse to close until durable knowledge is written back.
Phased plans should record continuation and keep workstream references recoverable.
Plan commands should canonicalize absolute plan paths before updating workstreams.
Validation or review defects should invalidate quality results and block closure until resolved with evidence.
Quality scoring should reject missing evidence notes and name the missing dimensions.
Knowledge closure should reject paraphrased evidence and accept exact destination text.
Plan start should create Markdown plus JSON sidecar state, and active checks should require a ready Acceptance Contract.
Quality scoring should fail before acceptance criteria are ready.
Plan closure should reject unresolved starter placeholders even after acceptance and scoring pass.
Plan closure should return structured JSON when durable knowledge remains open.
Plan closure should reject stale contract fingerprints and move Markdown plus sidecar metadata together.
Generated evidence cleanup should dry-run by default and remove only stale unreferenced artifacts when applied.
Eval output should expose structured per-case scores, findings, user-facing messages, and recommended actions.
Existing user-owned harness files should be skipped unless explicitly forced.
Backend-only repositories should not receive FRONTEND.md, DESIGN.md, or design-docs files.
Frontend repositories should receive FRONTEND.md and a project-owned DESIGN.md specification template seeded from style direction and existing code signals.
Harness Engine should not document or package an external design dependency, adapter, or skill invocation.
The npm package dry-run should exclude external design source, adapters, and external dependency files.
